$comment: D-OPT-SWITCH-JUMP-TABLE (c70): the sqlite VDBE-dispatch shape — a ~350-case DENSE contiguous switch (0..349) evaluated in a loop, exactly like sqlite3VdbeExec (the sqlite-green blocker c70 clears). Pre-c70 this exhausted the register allocator (~350 live case-constant vregs -> L_VirtualRegInPostRegalloc); the jump table makes it O(1) and the vregs vanish. step(op)=op*3+7 for op in [0..349] else -1; run() sums a fixed program in a loop to 3578; main() checks that plus first/last/above-max/below-min/interior boundary ops. gcc/clang emit a jump table and exit 42 (cross-checked x86_64 -O0/-O1, aarch64 -O1 qemu). This is the proof that c70 unblocks sqlite's switch shape. The release optimizedPipeline arm runs the shipped optimizer over the jump-table lowering.
